summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Legal Citation Lookup admin features. All 3 new admin features working correctly: CSV export, audit logging, and admin dashboard with tabs. Backend API tests: 14/14 passed. Frontend UI tests: All major functionality verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Refresh buttons exist and work but had minor script access issues during testing
ui_bugs.workaround: Refresh functionality works when clicked manually

passed_tests: Admin submissions endpoint returning 7 submission records
CSV export endpoint with proper headers and filename format
Audit logs endpoint returning 13 structured log entries
Admin dashboard loads with Submissions and Audit Log tabs
Export CSV button downloads submissions_YYYY-MM-DD.csv file
Submissions table with all expected headers (Email, Name, DOB, Phone, Address, Citation #, Zip Code, Action, Date)
Audit Log table with all expected headers (Timestamp, Action, User Email, User ID, Details)
Tab switching between Submissions and Audit Log
Audit log entries for USER_REGISTERED, USER_LOGIN, ADMIN_LOGIN, PROFILE_UPDATED, CITATION_SEARCH, EXPORT_SUBMISSIONS_CSV
Color-coded audit actions with proper timestamps
